description: A Department of Labor card in portrait format with a dark navy gradient frame. The upper half is a photograph of a bearded young factory worker wearing a backwards dark ball cap, clear safety glasses, and a navy work coverall with an 'EXCEL' patch and a 'Zack' name badge, standing in a machine shop with green and teal equipment, hoses, gauges and pipes. Centered over the lower portion of the photo is the slogan in white type: 'Blue Collar' in italic serif and 'BOOM!' in bold serif. The bottom half is a white rounded chart card titled 'Real Blue Collar Wage Boom' with subtitle 'Year-to-Date, Seasonally Adjusted Annual Rate (%)' and a U.S. Treasury Department seal in the corner. The bar chart lists values by president: Nixon (1969) 0.2, Carter (1977) 0.2, Reagan (1981) -2.1, H.W. Bush (1989) -1.5, Clinton (1993) 0.0, W. Bush (2001) 0.4, Obama (2009) -1.5, Trump (2017) 1.5, Biden (2021) -1.7, Trump (2025) 1.4; sourced to 'Bureau of Labor Statistics.' The DOL seal appears at the bottom.
notable_text: Blue Collar BOOM!; Real Blue Collar Wage Boom; Trump (2025) 1.4
